ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title held by the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department where the employee works */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee is based */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working for the company */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive, on-leave) */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "termination_reason" TEXT /* Reason for termination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title_name" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job responsibilities */,
  "salary_range_min" REAL /* Minimum salary range for the job title */,
  "salary_range_max" REAL /* Maximum salary range for the job title */,
  "job_family" TEXT /* Job family (e.g., management, technical, administrative) */,
  "job_level" TEXT /* Job level (e.g., entry-level, mid-level, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Department code */,
  "department_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is based */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "location_code" TEXT /* Location code */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance evaluation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being evaluated */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance evaluation */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given in the evaluation (1-5) */,
  "self_assessment" TEXT /* Self-assessment provided by the employee */,
  "evaluation_template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluation template used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_records" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  "certification_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the certification, if applicable */,
  "training_format" TEXT /* Format of the training (e.g., online, in-person, webinar) */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_records" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee taking leave */,
  "leave_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave type (e.g., vacation, sick leave) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the leave request (e.g., approved, pending, denied) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the leave request */,
  "leave_balance" REAL /* Current leave balance */,
  "leave_policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_records_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view-only, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the HRMS */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for access */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the benefit */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance_records" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "clock_in" TEXT /* Clock-in time */,
  "clock_out" TEXT /* Clock-out time */,
  "total_hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_records_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_processes" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment process */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title being recruited for */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "posting_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date the job posting closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recruitment process (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_processes_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_processes_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., resume, ID proof) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "document_content" TEXT /* Content of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
